nasb.text: I also discovered that the portions of the Levites had not been given them, so that the Levites and the singers who performed the service had gone away, each to his own field.

esv.text: I also found out that the portions of the Levites had not been given to them, so that the Levites and the singers, who did the work, had fled each to his field.

cnv.text: 我發覺利未人應得的分，沒有人供給他們，甚至供職的利未人和歌唱者，各人都跑回自己的田地去。

ccb.text: 我发现利未人没有得到应得之份，以致当值的利未人和歌乐手都跑回自己的田地。
